name: Select Water Solutions, Inc.
description: Select Water Solutions, Inc. is a leading provider of comprehensive water management and chemical solutions to the energy industry in the United States. The company specializes in the total water cycle, offering services that include water sourcing, transportation, treatment, recycling, and disposal. Operating through its Water Infrastructure, Water Services, and Chemical Technologies segments, Select Water Solutions focuses on delivering operational excellence and environmentally responsible solutions to support unconventional oil and gas production across major basins. Headquartered in Gainesville, Texas, the company is committed to sustainable water management practices for its diverse customer base.
